description:
Overview:
1. Crystal-like transparent amber solar light, very beautiful garden decoration, like bright crystal.
2. Two Optional Modes.Warm white, 2. Color change (RGB color), the light automatically lights up, staying all night.
High-efficiency solar panels
3. Solar panels can absorb sunlight and generate kinetic energy for light and can work automatically without electricity. Our polysilicon solar panels convert up to 19.5% of sunlight into electricity, ensuring long-lasting standby time.
4. Waterproof IP65 and heat resistant. Great outdoor safety night light, suitable for walls, courtyards, gardens, porches, lawns, paths, drains, etc. Designed to withstand extreme weather conditions.
5. The product includes screws, no messy wires, easy installation, and can be completed within one minute.


Notes:
Solar panel: 2V 0.26W
LED: 1 warm tone/1 RGB conversion
Solar panel charging time: 6 hours
Working time: 8 to 9 hours
Material: ABS plastic
Waterproof: IP65
Light source type: LED
Rated power:5 (W)
Voltage:1.2 (V)
Time of sunshine:8 (h)
Dimensions :650*80 (mm)
Life :100000 (h)
Use: villa garden ladder decorative lighting
Cross-border export for exclusive supply: No
Switch type: manual


Package Content:
1 x Solar Step Light
